zh.lifeSummary: Margaret de Coventry於1185年出生在英國英格蘭諾圖波藍德瓦林頓。她於1204年與Sir Robert de Fenwick III在英國諾圖波藍德分維其可結婚。他們至少是3個兒子的父母。她於1185年住在英國英格蘭諾圖波藍德且於1185年住在美國蒙大拿州米亞格黑卡素 堂卡素 其特利。她去世於1250年在法國皮卡迪索姆享年65歲。

nameMeanings.name: de
nameMeanings.attribution: Dictionary of American Family Names © Patrick Hanks 2003, 2006.
meanings: Some characteristic forenames:  Indian Dilip, Anirban, Gopal, Alok, Anindya, Arunava, Asit, Asok, Dibyendu, Goutam, Indra, Indranil.

variants.name: Dey
meanings: Some characteristic forenames:  Indian Ashit, Indu, Naina, Partha, Soumya, Ajit, Anjan, Anjana, Anup, Arjun, Arun, Ashim.
English, Scottish, and Welsh: variant of   Day  .
German: topographic name from a field name in North Rhine-Westphalia, denoting a sizeable piece of land, from Middle Low German dē ‘thigh’ (referring to the shape of the property).

nameMeanings.name: Coventry
nameMeanings.attribution: Dictionary of American Family Names © Patrick Hanks 2003, 2006.
meanings: English: habitational name from the city of Coventry in the West Midlands, which is probably named with the genitive case of an Old English personal name Cofa (compare Coveney ) + Old English trēow ‘tree’. This name is now common in eastern Scotland.

variants.name: Coveney
meanings: English (Kent): habitational name from a place in Cambridgeshire named Coveney, from either the genitive case of Old English cofa ‘shelter’ (see Cove ) or of a personal name Cofa (of uncertain origin) + Old English ēg ‘island’. This surname is also established in Ireland, where it is more probably a phonetic Anglicization of an Irish name. See sense 2.

Irish (Cork): shortened Anglicized form of Ó Coibhdheanaigh or Mac Coibhdheanaigh ‘descendant’ or ‘son’ of Coibhdheanach, a personal name derived from the Irish word coibhdhean ‘(marauding) troop, raiding party’.

nameMeanings.name: Margaret
nameMeanings.attribution: Dictionary of First Names © Patrick Hanks and Flavia Hodges 1990, 2003, 2006.
meanings: An extremely common given name from the Middle Ages onwards, derived via Old French Marguerite and Latin Margarita from Greek Margarītēs, from margaron ‘pearl’, a word ultimately of Hebrew origin. The name was always understood to mean ‘pearl’ throughout the Middle Ages. The first St Margaret was martyred at Antioch in Pisidia during the persecution instigated by the Emperor Diocletian in the early 4th century. However, there is some doubt about her name, as the same saint is venerated in the Orthodox Church as Marina . There were several other saintly bearers of the name, including St Margaret of Scotland ( d. 1093 ), wife of King Malcolm Canmore and daughter of Edmund Ironside of England. It was also the name of the wife of Henry VI of England, Margaret of Anjou ( 1430–82 ), and of Margaret Tudor ( 1489–1541 ), sister of Henry VIII , who married James IV of Scotland and ruled as regent there after his death. See also Margery , Marjorie .

variants.name: Margareta
meanings: From the Latin form of Greek Margarītēs. See Margaret .

en.lifeSummary: Margaret de Coventry was born in 1185, in Wallington, Northumberland, England, United Kingdom. She married Sir Robert de Fenwick III in 1204, in Fenwick, Northumberland, England. They were the parents of at least 3 sons. She lived in Northumberland, England, United Kingdom in 1185 and Castle Cemetery, Castle Town, Meagher, Montana, United States in 1185. She died in 1250, in Somme, Picardie, France, at the age of 65.

ja.lifeSummary: Margaret de Coventryは1185年にイギリスイギリスノースウンバーランドワリントンで生まれた。1204年にイギリスノースウンバーランドフエンウィックでSir Robert de Fenwick IIIと結婚した。彼らは少なくとも3人の息子の親であった。彼女は1185年にはイギリスイギリスノースウンバーランドに，1185年にはアメリカ合衆国モンタナ州メアグハーカストル トウンカストル セメテリーに住んでいた。彼女は1250年にフランスピカーディソンメで65歳で死去した。

ko.Wallington Castle, Wallington Castle: 미국 몬태나 주 미거 카스틀 타운 카스틀 세멧리
ko.lifeSummary: Margaret de Coventry(은)는 1185년 영국 잉글랜드 노르스벌랜드 월링턴에서 태어났다. 그녀는 1204년 영국 노르스벌랜드 펜윅에서 Sir Robert de Fenwick III(와)과 결혼했다. 그들은 적어도 세 명의 아들을 두었다. 1185년도에 영국 잉글랜드 노르스벌랜드에서, 1185년도에 미국 몬태나 주 미거 카스틀 타운 카스틀 세멧리에서 살았다. 그녀는 1250년 프랑스 피카디 솜에서 65세의 나이로 사망했다.

ru.lifeSummary: Margaret de Coventry родилась в 1185 г. в местности валлингтон, нортумбирланд, Англия, Великобритания. Она вышла замуж за человека по имени Sir Robert de Fenwick III в 1204 г. в местности фенвикк, нортумбирланд, Англия. У них было по крайней мере 3 сына. Она жила в местности нортумбирланд, Англия, Великобритания в 1185 году и в местности кастл кеметири, кастл тоун, мигир, Монтана, Соединенные штаты в 1185 году. Она умерла в 1250 г. в местности сомм, пикарди, Франция в возрасте 65 лет.
